data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the integration with onboarding workflows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for integration with onboarding workflows. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this integration is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for integration, but there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is implemented, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the integration with onboarding workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add integration verification check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that onboarding workflows are integrated and operational.
